content:
One underrated feature that completely changed how I process data.

5 min read
3 hours ago

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Before reading this article I will recommend you to read previous “PART 1” of this article.
Why Experienced Developers Reach for for…of
One thing that changed as I started building larger JavaScript applications was that I stopped asking:
“Can this code work?”
and started asking:
“Will this code still work six months from now when it processes five million records instead of five hundred?”
Those are completely different questions.
Most developers optimize for fewer lines of code.
Professional developers optimize for predictability.
That’s exactly where for...of earns its place.
It isn’t flashy.
It isn’t new.
It simply behaves exactly how you expect even when your application grows.
Decision 1: Sequential Execution Isn’t Slow — It’s Often Correct
